title: The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:MCIVOTESB.jpg]] |title=''The Marvel Comics
Illustrated Version of Star Wars:
The Empire Strikes Back'' |writer=*[[Archie Goodwin]] *[[Leigh Brackett]] {{C|Original screenplay}} *[[Lawrence Kasdan]] {{C|Original screenplay}} *[[George Lucas]] {{C|Original story}} |penciller=*[[Al Williamson]] *[[Carlos Garzón]] |inker=*Al Williamson *Carlos Garzón |letterer=*[[Rick Veitch]] *[[Jim Novak]] |colorist=[[Carl Gafford]] |cover artist=*[[Bob Larkin]] *Al Williamson *Carlos Garzón |editor=Archie Goodwin |publisher=[[Marvel Comics]] |release date=[[May]] [[1980]]{{Amazon|url=Empire-Strikes-Marvel-Comics-Version/dp/0960414606|text=Star Wars The Empire Strikes Back The Marvel Comics Version}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=224 |isbn=9780960414604 |isbn2= |timeline=[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']] to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. |series=[[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] |issues=39–44 |preceded by=[[The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars|''The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars'']] |followed by=''[[The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Return of the Jedi]]'' }} '''''The Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] graphic novel created by [[Archie Goodwin]] and [[Al Williamson]] that adapts the film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. It was published by [[Marvel Comics]] in [[May]] [[1980]], and the story was later serialized in issues 39–44 the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]]. The cover for this comic was also used for ''[[Marvel Special Edition 2: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' and [[Marvel Super Special 16|''Marvel Super Special'' 16]], though this book has a unique back cover design. ==Publisher's summary== ''The most eagerly awaited science-fantasy film of them all…now in a complete, full-color illustrated version from Marvel Comics!'' ==Contents== *[[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' (1977) 39]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' (1977) 40]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' (1977) 41]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' (1977) 42]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' (1977) 43]] *[[Star Wars (1977) 44|''Star Wars'' (1977) 44]] ==Continuity== In the book, [[Al Williamson]] and [[Carlos Garzón]]'s artwork for [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] resembles one of [[Ralph McQuarrie]]'s concepts for the character. When the story was reprinted in [[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' (1977) 42]], the artwork was updated to reflect Yoda's appearance from the film.[[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' (1977) 42]] ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780960414604}}; [[May]] [[1980]]; Marvel Comics; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:MCIVOTESB.jpg|Front cover File:Marvel_Special_Edition_2_cover_art_only.jpg|Cover art File:Marvel_Comics_Illustrated_TESB_back_cover.jpg|Back cover ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Amazon|url=Empire-Strikes-Marvel-Comics-Version/dp/0960414606|text=Star Wars The Empire Strikes Back The Marvel Comics Version}} {{Episode5Multimedia}} {{MarvelStarWars}} {{Interlang |ka=Marvel Comics-ის იმპერიის საპასუხო შეტევის ილუსტრირებული ვერსია }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Marvel Comics Illustrated Version of Star Wars: Empire Strikes Back, The}} [[Category:Marvel Illustrated Books]]
